reviews: The chef's special was out of this world. Fresh, creative, and perfectly executed. Will definitely be back.
We had our anniversary dinner here and it was magical. The staff went above and beyond to make it special.
The food was absolutely incredible. Every dish was beautifully presented and bursting with flavor.
description: Rusty Pelican Miami brings you a dining experience crafted with passion and the finest ingredients. From our kitchen to your table, every dish tells a story of flavor, tradition, and culinary artistry.
